---
title: "DES_Data"
format: html
editor: visual
---gitcreds::gitcreds_set()
---

## 

MVP simulation of when patients arrive, who they are, how long it takes to get first provider contact, a first-pass generic workup duration, and imaging use and timing.

```{r}
 

approx_weibull_from_median_p90 <- function(median_min, p90_min) {

  stopifnot(is.numeric(median_min), is.numeric(p90_min))

  stopifnot(length(median_min) == 1, length(p90_min) == 1)

  stopifnot(median_min > 0, p90_min > median_min)

 

  k <- log(log(10) / log(2)) / log(p90_min / median_min)

  lambda <- median_min / (log(2)^(1 / k))

 

  list(shape = k, scale = lambda)

}

 

sample_duration_weibull <- function(median_min, p90_min, n = 1) {

  pars <- approx_weibull_from_median_p90(median_min, p90_min)

  stats::rweibull(n, shape = pars$shape, scale = pars$scale)

}


```
